action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 4 eval on the iter-3 checkpoint achieved worst_region_accuracy=0.4933 (overall 0.6645). Africa remains the weakest region (0.4933) vs 0.68-0.75 for others. Iteration 3 took ~3 hours for 8 epochs, so we have budget for one more substantial training run (~4 hours). Analysis: The model is likely still underfitting/overfitting suboptimally. To improve generalization and specifically worst-region accuracy, I will: (1) add Model EMA (exponential moving average) which consistently improves OOD generalization; (2) switch from AutoAugment to RandAugment + RandomErasing for stronger augmentation; (3) add class-weighted CrossEntropy to handle heavy class imbalance (rare classes like helipad/nuclear_powerplant); (4) increase dropout to 0.3 and add label smoothing 0.1; (5) implement cosine LR schedule with 1-epoch linear warmup and separate backbone/head LRs; (6) keep region-balanced sampling but compute class weights; (7) expand TTA in predict.py to 4-flip ensemble (H, V, HV) for free robustness at test time. Decision: Train for 10 epochs with these changes and submit eval. Estimated time ~4 hours, leaving ~2.5 hours buffer for a final iteration if needed.
